implementation_guide.overview: This guide provides instructions for implementing process generation capabilities in the BAW Blueprint Parser mode. Since Mode Writer cannot create Python utilities directly, this document serves as a specification for implementation.

process_generator_utility.purpose: Generate Markdown files with Mermaid diagrams for business processes extracted from blueprint documents. This utility complements the business_object_generator.py and follows similar patterns.

function.name: generate_process_markdown
function.description: Generate complete Markdown file for a business process

function.name: generate_mermaid_diagram
function.description: Generate Mermaid diagram syntax from process structure

function.name: link_processes_to_business_objects
function.description: Create cross-references between processes and business objects
function.returns: Updated process definition with object links

directory_structure.description: Required directory structure for process generation

catalog_file_structure.description: Structure for process catalog JSON files

pattern.description: Generate flowchart with subgraphs for actors
pattern.template:
```mermaid flowchart TD Start([Start: {trigger}])
subgraph {actor1_name}[{actor1_display_name}] A1[{activity1_name}] A2[{activity2_name}] end
subgraph {actor2_name}[{actor2_display_name}] B1[{activity3_name}] B2{{gateway_name}} B3[{activity4_name}] end
Start --> A1 A1 --> A2 A2 --> B1 B1 --> B2 B2 -->|{condition1}| B3 B2 -->|{condition2}| End B3 --> End([End: {completion}])
style Start fill:#90EE90 style End fill:#FFB6C1 style B2 fill:#FFD700 ```

pattern.description: Generate sequence diagram for interaction processes

step.title: Integrate with Blueprint Parser Workflow
step.description: Update the blueprint parser to call process generation

actions.action: Import process_generator in blueprint parsing scripts

step.title: Create Helper Scripts
step.description: Create convenience scripts for process generation

actions.action: Create generate_processes.py script in project root
Add command-line interface for process generation
Support batch processing of multiple blueprints

example.name: generate_single_process
example.description: Generate a single process from definition

example.name: generate_process_catalog
example.code:
from toolkit_packager.generators.process_generator import generate_process_catalog
processes = [process_def1, process_def2, process_def3] catalog_path = Path("business-processes/catalog") generate_process_catalog(processes, "LifeInsuranceAndAnnuities", catalog_path)

test.name: test_mermaid_generation
test.description: Verify Mermaid diagram syntax is valid

test.name: test_business_object_linking
test.approach: Check that all referenced business objects exist

future_bpmn_generation.overview: The process metadata structure is designed to facilitate future BPMN generation. This section outlines the path from Mermaid to BPMN.

bpmn_generator_requirements.requirement: Map activities to BPMN task types
Convert gateways to BPMN gateway elements
Create BPMN pools and lanes from actors
Generate sequence flows from process flow
Add data associations for business objects
Generate BPMN XML conforming to BAW standards

integration.description: Process generator should reference business objects
integration.approach: Read business object catalog to validate references
Include process Markdown files in toolkit documentation
Use process activities to suggest coach flows
